Author: OOFGames
Name: Chocobo Racing Gamba
Description: Players pick a chocobo(s) to bet on, the host rolls /random to advance chocobos, and the first to reach the finish line wins. Type /crg or /Chocoboracinggamba to open the main window.
Punchline: Host Chocobo Racing Gamba with your friends in Eorzea!
Changelog:
Bug Fix:
- Fixed a bug where receiving a trade would not add/take from their bank.

Features:
- Added all-in betting support.
- Added another regex to pick up "300 k" as 300k and not 300.
- Added another button to repost chocobo names if someone joins after betting opens.
- Updated P/L tab to visibly see the profit and loss based on each player and for each session.
